description_long: This object is a classic hot dog featuring a plump sausage nestled inside a soft, rounded bun. The bun is golden-brown and slightly domed, enveloping the sausage with a generous opening on top. The sausage is topped with a colorful array of condiments, including yellow mustard, red ketchup, and green relish, all drizzled in wavy lines. The condiments are distributed along the length of the sausage, with some spilling onto the bun. The hot dog appears fresh and appetizing, with the condiments adding visual texture and vibrancy. No packaging or grill marks are visible, and the hot dog is presented as ready to eat.
description: A plump sausage in a golden-brown bun, topped with wavy lines of mustard, ketchup, and relish, creating a colorful and appetizing appearance.
description_view_0: The hot dog is seen from the side, showing the rounded bun and hints of condiments and sausage peeking out at the ends.
description_view_1: A top-down view reveals the open bun, fully displaying the sausage and the colorful condiments arranged along its length.
description_view_2: The opposite side view mirrors the first, with the bun's smooth exterior and a glimpse of the sausage and toppings at the edges.
description_view_3: A frontal view into the open bun, highlighting the sausage and the layered condiments most prominently.
